title: OpenCode Systems OC Messaging and USSD Gateway

scripts.content: SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx opencode\.com" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-71f210cc914c'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((query IN ("opencode.com"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count
